other_conditions: No family member in govt/semi-govt jobs; no prior scheme benefits except training.
Suffering from major ailments needing surgery (kidney, heart, liver, cancer, brain, knee, spinal) or life-threatening diseases.
Indian citizen, Maharashtra resident, Person with Disability, ranked 1st-3rd in SSC/HSC.
Death while working in journalism in Tamil Nadu. 5 years service mandatory for sudden death due to accident/fatal disease.
Resident of Jammu and Kashmir; not receiving pension under any other social security scheme.
Deceased must be registered worker with 90 days service or have builder/Inspector certificate.
Puducherry resident (birth/5+ yrs), valid driving licence, no prolonged disease, no prior similar subsidy, one per family.
Must be an Indian citizen.
Meghalaya domicile; full-time regular course; min 35% marks; valid mobile/email; recognized institution.
Permanent resident of Puducherry; deceased/disabled member of BPL family; no other government benefits allowed.
Student in Class 1-10, resident of Puducherry, parent engaged in unclean occupation.
Permanent resident of Gujarat with minimum 5 own animals.
Indian national, pursuing post-matric in recognized institution. Max 2 boys per family. No CPL/aviation courses. No repeating same education stage.
Individuals, societies, SHGs, associations, reservoir monopolies, or private units involved in inland fisheries.
MSME unit in Dadra & Nagar Haveli & Daman & Diu. Commence production 20.05.2022-19.05.2027. Apply within 1 year.
Gujarat resident; poultry training; own/leased land; 100 sq ft shed; 100 birds; 2-year maintenance.
Permanent resident of A&N Islands or Govt pensioners settled there with dependents.
Textile/apparel units started on/after 1 Apr 2022. Approved by financial institutions. Must hold WBTDCL certificates.
Labour Intensive Unit: 4000+ EPF employees (1000+ female). Eligible textile activities. Loan disbursement >=01/01/2024. Apply within 1 yr of DoCP. Regular repayment. Bear 2% interest.
Native of Tamil Nadu, manufacturer of handicrafts in Tamil Nadu, proficient in Tamil, contributor to Tamil literature, use non-toxic materials.
Chhattisgarh resident (5+ yrs); max 2 animals; animal <5 yrs, >10L milk/day; 3yr insurance; 1 beneficiary/family; no 2 high-breed animals.
Resident of India; disability >80% or dwarfism.
Permanent resident of Haryana; disability >=40%; land owned or leased >20 years from govt.
Bihar resident; enrolled in recognized course/institution; residing in SC/ST Welfare Dept hostel.
Applicant must be a livestock owner; animal must be in last trimester of pregnancy.
Applicant must be dependent of deceased worker registered with JKBOCWWB with active membership. Scheme applicable only once.
Unorganized workers selling tea/snacks/food registered with State Social Security Board 90 days prior. One-time benefit only. No other parallel scheme benefits.
Indian citizen; deceased breadwinner aged 18-60; applicant is succeeding breadwinner.
Resident of Sikkim, registered member of Sikkim Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, served 90 days/year, suffering from specified diseases.
Applicant must be temple authority; temple not under Dept of Hindu Religious Institutions; situated in Adi-Dravidar colonies or EWS areas.
Orgs registered under relevant Act, audited accounts for 3 yrs, approved events, max 3 events/yr, 3-yr participation limit.
Regular faculty with 5+ years teaching exp. VC/Director/Principal excluded. No self-nomination.
Applicant must be legal nominee/dependent of deceased registered worker in Meghalaya.
Native of MP, 40%+ disability, pass UPSC/MPPSC stage, apply within 6 months of result.
Must be part of a PGS-India cluster covering ~20 hectares in a contiguous area.
Must have Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP). Assistance for new cycle with ice box only for fisheries activity.
Must belong to OEC/OEC of Kerala; studying in Class 1-10 in Govt/Aided/Recognized/CBSE/ICSE/KV schools in Kerala.
Valid disability certificate under National Trust Act, 1999. Excludes J&K.
Includes school-going girls, adolescents, pregnant/lactating women, children (6m-10y), and women (19-49y).
Permanent resident of Madhya Pradesh; enrolled in Class 10th or 12th; selected via MP Board merit list.
